description: Represents a CodeBuild sandbox, an ephemeral compute environment started from a CodeBuild project.

RequestTime.description: When the sandbox process was initially requested, expressed in ISO 8601 format.

StartTime.description: When the sandbox process started, expressed in ISO 8601 format.

EncryptionKey.description: The KMS key used for encrypting the sandbox output artifacts.

ServiceRole.description: The name of a service role used for this sandbox.

TimeoutInMinutes.description: How long, in minutes, for CodeBuild to wait before timing out this sandbox.

QueuedTimeoutInMinutes.description: The number of minutes a sandbox is allowed to be queued before it times out.
